description: Planned engineering works on the M1 line. Stations between MS01 and MS05 will be closed.
replacement_service: Bus replacements running every 10 minutes between MS01 and MS05

description: Emergency services dealing with an incident at Central Station. All lines through Central Station are suspended.
replacement_service: Ticket acceptance on local bus services.

description: Severe flooding on the tracks between NR08 and NR10. Trains are running at reduced speed or terminating early.
